location.origin: Olympia, Washington (K Records context). New York roots (Moldy Peaches). Solo work released on K Records, Calvin Johnson's Olympia label.
location.formative: K Records aesthetic. Lo-fi as ideology. Handmade, intimate, anti-corporate. The stripped-down solo voice after the Moldy Peaches.
location.career: Kimya Dawson RETURNS -- first appeared at degree 49 (Anti-Folk, E=2, the lullaby subversion, the trojan lullabist). Now in solo/K Records context (Lo-Fi Folk, E=3). Fifth return artist. Genre Stage 70 (milestone -- 70th genre stage). Energy increases from E=2 to E=3. K Records (second K Records after LAKE at 73).

labels: K Records (Calvin Johnson's Olympia label; second K Records artist after LAKE at degree 73; lo-fi as ideology; handmade, intimate, anti-corporate)

members.name: Kimya Dawson
members.note: RETURN artist. Degree 49 (Anti-Folk, E=2, Moldy Peaches context) and degree 88 (Lo-Fi Folk, E=3, solo/K Records). Fifth return artist. Energy increases on return. The trojan lullabist becomes the confident lo-fi folk singer.

associated_musicians.name: Kimya Dawson (Moldy Peaches)
associated_musicians.note: Anti-Folk at E=2. The lullaby subversion. The trojan lullabist. Degree 88 is the solo context -- stripped down further.

associated_musicians.name: LAKE
associated_musicians.note: First K Records artist. Both Olympia, both lo-fi, both K Records aesthetic. LAKE is a band; Dawson is solo.

associated_musicians.name: Phil Elverum
associated_musicians.note: Microphones/Mount Eerie on K Records. Olympia lo-fi lineage: Elverum (71), LAKE (73), Dawson (88).

associated_musicians.name: Neko Case (Early Folk)
associated_musicians.note: Back-to-back returns (87-88). Both women returning. Case energy decreased; Dawson energy increased. Both arrive at E=3.

associated_musicians.name: Damien Jurado
associated_musicians.note: Jurado 45/84 (gap 39). Dawson 49/88 (gap 39). Both return exactly 39 degrees later.

theory_nodes.concept: The bedroom strum (eighty-ninth acoustic element -- solo Kimya Dawson, single acoustic guitar strummed simply, recorded without production, room sound audible, imperfections as authenticity, the minimum viable song, K Records aesthetic as sound)
examples: Kimya Dawson solo (degree 88) -- acoustic guitar, unpolished vocals, room sound. The bedroom strum.
Contrast with the emerging twang (degree 87, Neko Case) -- Neko Case has pedal steel, genre infrastructure. Dawson has nothing but guitar and voice.
The bedroom strum is minimum production after the electronic pulse's (86) maximum production. The engine swings.
The imperfections -- out-of-tune guitar, imperfect timing -- are the point. They signal authenticity. K Records ideology.
theory_nodes.description: The bedroom strum is the eighty-ninth acoustic element. Solo guitar, unpolished vocals, room sound, imperfections as authenticity. The minimum viable song.

ancestors: The emerging twang (degree 87, Case) -- folk-country with genre infrastructure. The bedroom strum removes all infrastructure.
The stripped confession (degree 85, Votolato) -- both stripped-down. But Votolato's stripping is dramatic; Dawson's is natural.
genealogy.relationship: Eighty-nine acoustic elements across eighty-eight degrees. Track element 90 at degree 89.

theory_nodes.concept: The solo distillation (eighty-ninth artist-city pattern -- return artist strips away band context to essentials; Moldy Peaches communal energy, irony, duo dynamic removed; one voice, one guitar, the songs; what remains when everything else is removed)
examples: Kimya Dawson (degree 88) -- solo work strips away Moldy Peaches context. One voice, one guitar.
The solo distillation reveals what remains: the songs themselves, unadorned, unprotected.
Contrast with the early chapter (degree 87, Case) -- temporal movement. The solo distillation is format reduction (band to solo).
Contrast with the side project (degree 86, Postal Service) -- lateral movement to new collaborator. The solo distillation moves away from collaboration entirely.
theory_nodes.description: The solo distillation is the eighty-ninth artist-city pattern. Return artist strips away band context. One voice, one guitar. What remains when everything is removed.

ancestors: The early chapter (degree 87, Case) -- temporal movement. Solo distillation is format reduction.
The side project (degree 86, Postal Service) -- collaborative movement. Solo distillation moves away from collaboration.
genealogy.relationship: Eighty-nine artist-city patterns across eighty-eight degrees. Track pattern 90 at degree 89.

theory_nodes.concept: Fifth return artist -- Kimya Dawson returns (49/88); fifth return: Jurado (45/84), Votolato (46/85), Death Cab (58/82), Case (66/87), Dawson (49/88); first energy increase on return (E=2 to E=3); return zone extends (82, 84, 85, 87, 88); spacing symmetry with Jurado (both gap 39)
examples: Kimya Dawson: degree 49 (Anti-Folk, E=2) and degree 88 (Lo-Fi Folk, E=3). Fifth return.
Return zone: 82, 84, 85, 87, 88. Five returns in seven degrees. Dense.
Spacing symmetry: Jurado 45/84 (gap 39), Dawson 49/88 (gap 39). Both return exactly 39 degrees later.
Energy: first return where energy increases. E=2 to E=3. Solo context gives more room.
theory_nodes.description: Fifth return artist at degree 88. Kimya Dawson returns. Energy increases E=2 to E=3. Return zone dense. Spacing symmetry with Jurado (gap 39).

ancestors: Fourth return (Case 66/87) at degree 87. Dawson follows immediately.
Jurado 45/84 -- spacing symmetry. Both gap 39 degrees.
genealogy.relationship: Fifth return at degree 88. Track future returns.

theory_nodes.concept: Lo-Fi Folk at Genre Stage 70 -- milestone; 70th genre stage; Kimya Dawson solo on K Records; lo-fi as ideology; distinguished from Anti-Folk (49) by solo sincerity vs communal irony; handmade aesthetic
examples: Kimya Dawson (degree 88) -- Lo-Fi Folk at Genre Stage 70. Milestone: 70th genre stage.
Distinguished from Anti-Folk (degree 49) -- solo sincerity vs communal irony. K Records vs Anti-Folk scene.
70 genre stages in 88 degrees = ~0.8 genre stages per degree. High genre density.
theory_nodes.description: Lo-Fi Folk at Genre Stage 70. Milestone. K Records aesthetic. Distinguished from Anti-Folk (49). 70th genre in 88 degrees.

ancestors: Anti-Folk (degree 49) -- communal, ironic. Lo-Fi Folk is solo, sincere.
K Records aesthetic defines the genre context.
genealogy.relationship: Genre Stage 70 at degree 88. Milestone. Track at 89.

theory_nodes.concept: E=3 at degree 88 -- energy increase from E=2 (degree 49); first return where energy increases; solo work more confident than Moldy Peaches lullabies; the voice has more range outside the duo
examples: Kimya Dawson (degree 88) -- E=3. Up from E=2 at degree 49.
First energy increase on return. Solo work more confident.
Convergence: Case decreased to E=3 (87), Dawson increased to E=3 (88). Both arrive at E=3.
theory_nodes.description: E=3 at degree 88. Up from E=2. First energy increase on return. Solo confidence exceeds Moldy Peaches fragility.

ancestors: E=3 at degree 87 (Neko Case). Holds at E=3.
E=2 at degree 49 (Dawson original). Increases to E=3.

theory_nodes.concept: K Records -- second artist; Calvin Johnson's Olympia label; lo-fi as ideology; handmade, intimate, anti-corporate; LAKE (73) first, Dawson (88) second; Olympia lo-fi lineage
examples: Kimya Dawson (degree 88) -- K Records. Second K Records artist after LAKE (73).
K Records aesthetic: lo-fi, handmade, intimate, anti-corporate. Dawson is a natural fit.
Olympia lineage: Elverum (71), LAKE (73), Dawson (88). Three degrees of K Records connection.
theory_nodes.description: K Records second artist at degree 88. Calvin Johnson's Olympia label. Lo-fi as ideology. Olympia lineage.

ancestors: LAKE (degree 73) on K Records. First K Records artist.
Phil Elverum (degree 71) in K Records orbit. Olympia lineage.
genealogy.relationship: K Records: 2 artists. Track future appearances.

cross_references.relationship: Original appearance. Anti-Folk at E=2. The lullaby subversion. Degree 88 is the solo/K Records context. Same artist, different framework. Energy increases E=2 to E=3.
K Records connection. First K Records artist. Both Olympia, both lo-fi, both K Records aesthetic. LAKE is band; Dawson is solo.
K Records orbit. Microphones/Mount Eerie on K. Olympia lo-fi lineage: Elverum (71), LAKE (73), Dawson (88).
Return pattern. Case returned at 87, Dawson at 88. Back-to-back returns. Both women. Case energy decreased; Dawson increased. Both arrive at E=3.
Consecutive returns. Return zone: 82, 84, 85, 87, 88. Five returns in seven degrees.
Return spacing symmetry. Jurado 45/84 (gap 39). Dawson 49/88 (gap 39). Both return exactly 39 degrees later.
